criteria: Agent should detect that persistent cover image conflicts with the stated constraints.
Agent should not generate a cross-stack patch that violates the constraints.
Agent should explain feasible alternatives, such as frontend-only mock display or requiring permission to modify backend/model/form.
Agent should mark the task as blocked or clarification_required.
